where.if: AND (p.order_id::TEXT ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR p.pg_transaction_id ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR m.member_email ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR o.member_nm ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT p.*, o.member_nm, o.order_date, o.order_status_cd, m.member_email, cd_ps.code_label AS pay_status_cd_nm, cd_pm.code_label AS pay_method_cd_nm, cd_pd.code_label AS pay_dir_cd_nm, cd_pc.code_label AS pay_channel_cd_nm, cd_rs.code_label AS refund_status_cd_nm, cd_vb.code_label AS vbank_bank_code_nm, cd_ct.code_label AS card_type_cd_nm FROM od_pay p LEFT JOIN od_order o ON o.order_id = p.order_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = o.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PAY_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = p.pay_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pm ON cd_pm.code_grp = 'PAY_METHOD' AND cd_pm.code_value = p.pay_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pd ON cd_pd.code_grp = 'PAY_DIR' AND cd_pd.code_value = p.pay_dir_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pc ON cd_pc.code_grp = 'PAY_CHANNEL' AND cd_pc.code_value = p.pay_channel_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REFUND_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = p.refund_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vb ON cd_vb.code_grp = 'BANK_CODE' AND cd_vb.code_value = p.vbank_bank_code LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'CARD_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = p.card_type_cd WHERE p.pay_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM od_pay p LEFT JOIN od_order o ON o.order_id = p.order_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = o.member_id

SELECT p.*, cd_ps.code_label AS pay_status_cd_nm, cd_pm.code_label AS pay_method_cd_nm, cd_pd.code_label AS pay_dir_cd_nm, cd_rs.code_label AS refund_status_cd_nm FROM od_pay p LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ps ON cd_ps.code_grp = 'PAY_STATUS' AND cd_ps.code_value = p.pay_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pm ON cd_pm.code_grp = 'PAY_METHOD' AND cd_pm.code_value = p.pay_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pd ON cd_pd.code_grp = 'PAY_DIR' AND cd_pd.code_value = p.pay_dir_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REFUND_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = p.refund_status_cd WHERE p.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY p.reg_date ASC
